abstract: The paper studies how personalized product recommendations and their accuracy affect seller competition in an online marketplace.

affiliation: Robert H. Smith School of Business, University of Maryland, College Park, Maryland 20742;
authors_full.name: Bo Zhou

affiliation: Warrington College of Business, University of Florida, Gainesville, Florida 32611
authors_full.name: Tianxin Zou

ob.ai_reason: 研究个性化推荐算法对市场竞争的影响，算法为核心变量
ob.tldr: 研究个性化推荐及其精准度如何影响线上市场中卖家的竞争格局。通过构建博弈模型并结合平台数据，分析发现更高的推荐精准度会强化头部卖家优势，同时促使长尾卖家通过差异化或付费推广获取曝光，导致竞争格局两极化。

title: Competing for Recommendations: The Strategic Impact of Personalized Product Recommendations in Online Marketplaces
title_zh: 争夺推荐：个性化产品推荐对在线市场的影响
